prompt: Build a notifications dropdown for the navbar — a bell icon with an unread count badge. Click to expand a panel showing recent notifications. The panel should close when clicked outside.

assertions.text: Uses a Stimulus controller (no `.coffee` files; JS imports/extends Stimulus `Controller`)
assertions.check: outputs contain at least one .js file matching `from "@hotwired/stimulus"` or `from 'stimulus'` AND `extends Controller`; no `.coffee` files present

assertions.text: Tailwind utility classes use the `tw:` prefix
assertions.check: no class token in any class="..." attribute matches a Tailwind utility pattern without the `tw:` prefix

assertions.text: If structured as a ViewComponent, the component initializes with keyword args and uses `helpers.` prefix in the template
assertions.check: if a *_component.rb file is present in outputs, its initialize uses keyword arguments and the template uses `helpers.` prefix for any Rails helpers used. Pass if no component is created.
